title: Resume Bullet Point Enhancer
body: Improve the following resume bullet point by making it results-driven and impactful. Use action verbs and quantify achievements where possible.\nBullet:\n{paste_bullet_here}

title: UI Idea Generator for Apps
body: Act as a product designer. Based on the following app idea, suggest a modern and user-friendly UI layout. Include screen structure, key components, and UX improvements.\nApp Idea:\n{paste_idea_here}

title: Explain Like I'm 5 (ELI5)
body: Explain the following concept in the simplest way possible, as if explaining to a 5-year-old. Use analogies and real-life examples.\nConcept:\n{paste_concept_here}

title: Generate Clean LinkedIn Post
body: Write a professional LinkedIn post about the following topic. Keep it concise, engaging, and human. Use a strong hook in the first line, avoid fluff, and end with a thoughtful closing.\nTopic:\n{paste_topic_here}

title: Convert Code Between Languages
body: Convert the following code from {source_language} to {target_language}. Maintain the same logic, improve readability, and follow best practices of the target language. Add comments where necessary.\nCode:\n{paste_code_here}
